Class ResolverExtensions

Extension methods on MultitenancyBuilder for registering resolver strategies.

WithClaimsResolver(MultitenancyBuilder, string)

Adds a ClaimsTenantResolver that resolves tenant from a JWT claim.

Declaration
public static MultitenancyBuilder WithClaimsResolver(this MultitenancyBuilder builder, string claimType = "tid")
Parameters
Type Name Description
MultitenancyBuilder builder

The multitenancy builder.
string claimType

The claim type that carries the tenant ID. Defaults to tid.
Returns
Type Description
MultitenancyBuilder
| Edit this page View Source

WithHeaderResolver(MultitenancyBuilder, string)

Adds a HeaderTenantResolver that reads tenant ID from an HTTP header.

Declaration
public static MultitenancyBuilder WithHeaderResolver(this MultitenancyBuilder builder, string headerName = "X-Tenant-Id")
Parameters
Type Name Description
MultitenancyBuilder builder

The multitenancy builder.
string headerName

The header to read. Defaults to X-Tenant-Id.
Returns
Type Description
MultitenancyBuilder
| Edit this page View Source

WithHostResolver(MultitenancyBuilder, string?)

Adds a HostTenantResolver that resolves tenant from the request subdomain.

Declaration
public static MultitenancyBuilder WithHostResolver(this MultitenancyBuilder builder, string? baseDomain = null)
Parameters
Type Name Description
MultitenancyBuilder builder

The multitenancy builder.
string baseDomain

Optional base domain to strip (e.g., "app.com").
Returns
Type Description
MultitenancyBuilder
| Edit this page View Source

WithPathResolver(MultitenancyBuilder)

Adds a PathTenantResolver that resolves tenant from the URL prefix.
